classification_sources.response_schema: codex-rs app-server-protocol common.rs request definition macros, constrained to checked-in baseline methods
classification_sources.source_ref: baseline metadata plus aggregate schema pointer
classification_sources.stability: stable-vs-experimental schema visibility comparison; stable means present in stable schema, not an upstream lifetime guarantee
classification_sources.generated_surface: exported Go identities compared between generation without and with experimental schema visibility

description: Classified manifest generated from aggregate app-server schemas, checked-in response mapping rules, facade target rules, and stable-vs-experimental schema comparison.
